title: Epic Fight x Knight Quest [Compatibility]
description: A Knight Quest compatibility pack for Epic Fight.
body:
**Epic Fight x Knight Quest** is a compatibility layer of the mod [Knight Quest](https://modrinth.com/mod/knight-quest) for Epic Fight.
This is a simple resourcepack that fixes the invisible helmet bug (along with other armor items) and adds capabilities for every weapon. All bug reports should be directed to me, you can join our [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/Pxj3gdhGj8). You can modify this pack as much as you want to fit your needs.
